projects.Title: ResumeGPT
Highlights: Developed an LLM-powered RAG system enabling conversational querying of resumes, combining semantic search with GPT-based generation for context-aware responses.
Implemented embedding-based indexing to efficiently retrieve relevant resume content, reducing redundant API calls and improving response relevance.
Designed and built Spring Boot REST APIs to handle resume ingestion, vector storage, and LLM query orchestration.
Integrated OpenAI API for natural language understanding and generation, enabling accurate, human-like responses.
Containerized the application using Docker and deployed to a cloud-hosted environment, enabling consistent, reproducible builds and streamlined scaling across development and production.
Architected the system with a modular, service-oriented design, demonstrating expertise in LLM integration, semantic search, and AI-driven applications.

professionalExperience.Title: Application Systems Programmer III
Responsibilities: Engineered and enhanced a centralized Single Sign-On (SSO) platform using Spring Boot and React, enabling secure authentication across all agency applications.
Architected, developed, and maintained critical Java applications/microservices and PHP applications/libraries for a large state agency
Spearheaded the development of the department's first Java-based microservice, moving functionality from an existing SSO portal into a new Jersey-based service
Eliminated a security vulnerability in Java-based authentication systems where credentials could be transmitted in plaintext
Updated the PHP SSO component to align with Java authorization/authentication library
Led the full rewrite of the SRF (State Revolving Fund) application, significantly reducing bug volume and improving system stability for a critical statewide federal program.
Rewrote the database interaction layer of the SRF application using Regex within IntelliJ IDEA
Moved all package calls to Hibernate, reducing a months-long task to ~30 minutes at the package level
Developed PHP libraries for the MergeToPdf microservice and DepDac (Dynamic Assembly Component), which were instrumental in token handling and secure data exchange
Managed and optimized Oracle and PostgreSQL databases, ensuring data integrity and application performance
Utilized Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to design and implement scalable and maintainable code
Contributed to various phases of the software development lifecycle, including requirements gathering, design, coding, testing, and deployment

Taught several classes, including one on Astrogrep, a grep front-end tool, and wrote comprehensive migration guides and several wiki pages on diverse topics that were used by the whole team (~70 people)
Containerized Java microservices using Docker to enable scalable and reproducible deployments
Deployed and managed Java microservices on Azure, enabling scalable and reliable cloud-based application delivery.
Administered build server infrastructure and development tools (GitLab, Jira), supporting CI/CD pipelines, managing access control, and improving development workflow efficiency across teams.

Assisted in the maintenance and optimization of existing database systems, including MySQL and MariaDB
Administered build server infrastructure and development tools (GitLab, Jira), supporting CI/CD workflows, managing access and configurations, and improving overall development efficiency.
